description: Maps a module to its 6E stages. One row per module per stage. Acts as the stage container; actual content lives in 6e_content.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this module-stage record

fields.name: module_id
fields.description: Module this stage record belongs to

fields.name: stage_name
fields.description: 6E stage this record represents for the module

fields.name: stage_order
fields.description: Fixed display order of the stage within the module. 1=engage, 2=explore, 3=explain, 4=express, 5=empower, 6=evolve

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this stage is active and visible to learners

unique_constraints.name: uq_modules_content_module_stage
unique_constraints.description: Each module can have only one record per 6E stage

indexes.name: idx_modules_content_module_id
indexes.description: Get all stage records for a module

indexes.name: idx_modules_content_stage_name
indexes.description: Filter by 6E stage across all modules

indexes.name: idx_modules_content_module_stage_order
indexes.description: Fetch stages in sequence for a module

relationships.description: Each stage record belongs to one module
One stage record can have multiple content pieces
